title: The Impact of Current Economic Conditions on the Insurance Ecosystem
author: Andrew Ortwein
body: Recently, Frank Paul Tomasello, Executive Director of The Institutes Griffith Foundation visited with Michel Leonard, PhD, CBE, Chief Economist and Data Scientist at the Insurance Information Institute (Triple-I) and adjunct faculty member at NYU's Economics Department. They discussed the current state of the economy and considered implications for the insurance ecosystem. Some covered topics include: the resilience of the economy; inflation; and, the current interest rate environment as related to the insurance ecosystem. This discussion is strictly informational and does not take a stance on any issues.
